title: GarticSMP: Modded
description: Official 'GarticSMP' pack for the modded seasons of the server!
body:
# CURRENT THEME: FANTASY
## 🌟 GarticSMP: Modded

GarticSMP: Modded is part of an ongoing, evolving Minecraft modpack series designed around curated themes, seasonal updates, and balanced gameplay — perfect for servers, friends, or solo adventures.

## 🔁 Seasonal Themes & Structure

Each season introduces a new theme chosen privately by the core SMP members — not by public vote or community poll. These themes are intentionally vague to allow flexibility and surprise in mod selection, ensuring that each season feels new without being totally disconnected from past ones.

Mod choices are handpicked for balance, variety, and player experience, often blending tech, magic, exploration, building, and quality-of-life mods — depending on the season’s theme.

## 🔒 Private Server, Public Pack

While the SMP server itself is private and not open for public joining, the modpack is freely available for anyone to download and use. You're welcome to play in singleplayer, use it for your own server, or explore it with friends.

This allows players to enjoy the same curated experience, even if they’re not part of the main SMP.
